name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: normalized catalog listing (system + number); stamp instances may reference one primary entry.

entities.name: scott_catalog_entry
entities.brief: Abstract listing in a published catalog (not a physical copy).
entities.description: Identifies a stamp design or major listing in a catalog system (Scott, Michel, etc.). Primary key is the composite field scott (country_id, section, number, variation). Optional issue_series_id ties the listing to a set or series row; optional perforation records the catalog-listed gauge or style. A stamp instance optionally points here via the same composite key; additional cross-references stay in stamp_catalog_number.

field_definitions.name: scott_listing_key
field_definitions.description: Listing key: issuing country plus Scott section, numeral, and variety (composite primary key and foreign-key shape on stamp).

composite.name: country_id
composite.description: Issuing country or postal administration for this listing (denormalized; use with country.scott_catalog_entries nesting).

composite.name: section
composite.description: Scott major-section letter or pair (e.g. B, RW); omit for regular postage.

fields.name: catalog_system_abbreviation
fields.description: Which catalog the number belongs to (matches catalog_system primary key).

fields.name: issue_series_id
fields.description: Stamp set or series this catalog listing belongs to, when known.

fields.name: perforation
fields.description: Perforation as given for this listing (e.g. perf 11½, comb 13¾, imperforate, roulette).

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Variety, plate, or supplement commentary for this listing.
